name: Qiimaynta fuuq-baxa
description: Qiimaynta goobta ee fuuq-baxa iyo darnaanta jirrada kulaylka. Midabka kaadidu waa tusaha goobta ugu waxtarka badan. Qiimee heerka maskaxeed ee calaamad u ah fuuq-baxa ba'an ee u socda kulaylka istaroogga.
instructions: Hubi midabka kaadida, maqaarka maqaarka, heerka maskaxeed, iyo calaamadaha muhiimka ah. Kaadi madow, xuub-xabeedka engegan, iyo tachycardia waxay muujinayaan fuuqbax weyn oo u baahan fuuq-celin firfircoon.

categories.label: Biyo Wanaagsan
categories.description: Midab huruud ah si ay u nadiifiso kaadida. Looma baahna faragelin

categories.label: Fuuqbax fudud
categories.description: Kaadi huruud ah, oon. Fuuqcelinta afka. Ku dhiiri geli 250-500 ml oo biyo ah saacaddii.

categories.label: Fuuqbax daran oo dhexdhexaad ah
categories.description: Kaadida Amber, HR oo kor u kacday, maqaarka maqaarka oo yaraada, af qalalan. Dheecaannada IV/IO haddii aan afka loo dulqaadan. 1-2L LR ama NS.

categories.label: Khatarta -- Heat Stroke / Daran
categories.description: Soo saarista kaadida ugu yar, LOC oo beddeshay, maqaar qallalan oo kulul. Xaalad degdeg ah oo caafimaad -- qaboojin degdeg ah + dareerayaasha faleebbaha + MEDEVAC.

pediatric.note: Carruurtu waxay fuuqbaxaan si ka dhaqso badan dadka waaweyn. fontanelle (ilmaha yaryar), ilmada maqan, iyo caajisnimada ayaa ah calaamadaha muhiimka ah. IV: 20 ml/kg LR bolus.

obstetric.note: Haweenka uurka leh waxay u baahan yihiin in la kordhiyo qaadashada dareeraha. Fuuqbaxa ayaa kicin kara foosha kahor. Fuuqbaxa afka ee degdega ah marka hore; IV haddii aan loo dulqaadan karin afka.

source: PHTLS / Wilderness Medicine / US Army Hot Weather Ops
